title: Plagiotaxis

The classification of Plagiotaxis places it in the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The two species of Plagiotaxis are characterized by their small, daisy-like flowers and hairy leaves. Overall, the classification of Plagiotaxis provides valuable information about its evolutionary relationships and place within the plant kingdom.
